response.justification: Bogdan has strong general software engineering credentials with 16+ years of experience shipping products and building distributed systems. However, the role has a critical requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, and his resume shows only ~6 months of documented C++ work at National Instruments, plus academic thesis work. C++ is not even listed in his skills section. Additionally, while he has senior/staff titles, there is limited concrete evidence of technical leadership mentoring cloud or DevOps teams, which is a preferred qualification. His background is primarily full-stack and polyglot engineering rather than systems-level platform development.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (16+ years) across multiple domains with proven ability to ship production systems at scale
Demonstrated expertise in distributed systems and microservices (handled millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby), Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD infrastructure
Strong software engineering practices including TDD, design thinking, and mentorship (organized code dojos, created technical courses)
concerns: Critical gap in required C++ experience: job requires 8 years, resume shows only ~6 months at National Instruments plus academic work; C++ not listed in skills section
Limited evidence of technical leadership in cloud/platform engineering contexts; senior titles appear primarily in full-stack or product-focused roles rather than infrastructure/platform leadership
Cloud platform architecture experience appears minimal; while he has used AWS CDK and Kubernetes, no indication of owning large-scale cloud compute platform strategy or architecture
